response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, demonstrated leadership in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, and deep technical breadth across cloud, data, and systems — but lacks explicit evidence of 8+ years in production-grade GenAI solutions, vector databases, RAG architectures, or multi-agent frameworks like LangGraph, and his education is a BS without advanced degree, which reduces alignment with staff-level GenAI cloud expectations.
strengths: Proven experience in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq
Extensive full-stack and cloud (AWS, Docker, Kubernetes) delivery history across enterprises
Strong technical leadership through workshops, open-source projects, and cross-team mentoring
concerns: No clear documentation of 8+ years focused on production-grade GenAI or RAG systems
Missing explicit experience with vector databases or multi-agent frameworks like LangGraph/CrewAI
No advanced degree (Master’s/PhD) and limited evidence of LLM optimization or evaluation pipeline design
